Title: User Authentication Success
Test Data: A valid user with correct credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
Expected Result: Main receives success and proceeds with the next operation.

Title: User Authentication Failure
Test Data: An invalid user with incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns failure to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes failure to Main.
Expected Result: Main receives failure and prompts the user to try again.

Title: Create User Profile
Test Data: A new user with all required fields filled.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates GetDataFromUser.
2. Local User provides user data.
3. Main checks the data.
4. Main requests data from the Data Manager.
5. Data Manager returns success to Main.
6. Main signals success to the Local User.
Expected Result: User profile is created successfully.

Title: Re-enter User Data
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates GetDataFromUser.
2. Local User provides invalid user data.
3. Main checks the data and requests re-entry.
4. Local User re-provides valid user data.
5. Main checks the data.
6. Main requests data from the Data Manager.
7. Data Manager returns success to Main.
8. Main signals success to the Local User.
Expected Result: User profile is created successfully after re-entry.

Title: Add User Data
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main sends data to the Data Manager.
6. Data Manager processes the data and returns success.
7. Main signals success to the Local User.
Expected Result: User data is added successfully.

Title: Update User Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has existing data.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main sends updated data to the Data Manager.
6. Data Manager processes the data and returns success.
7. Main signals success to the Local User.
Expected Result: User data is updated successfully.

Title: Generate Report
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main requests data from the Local User.
6. Local User provides consumption data.
7. Local User sends data to the Data Manager.
8. Data Manager processes the data and returns success.
9. Data Manager sends success to the Local User.
10. Local User signals success to Main.
Expected Result: Report is generated successfully.

Title: Generate Report with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated but has no consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main requests data from the Local User.
6. Local User provides no consumption data.
7. Local User sends no data to the Data Manager.
8. Data Manager returns failure.
9. Data Manager sends failure to the Local User.
10. Local User signals failure to Main.
Expected Result: Report generation fails due to lack of consumption data.

Title: Track Achievement
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main sends achievement data to the NotifySystem.
6. NotifySystem notifies the user about the achievement.
Expected Result: Achievement is tracked and user is notified.

Title: Track Achievement with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User does not have any achievements.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main sends invalid achievement data to the NotifySystem.
6. NotifySystem does not notify the user.
Expected Result: Achievement tracking fails due to invalid data.

Title: Delete Report
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates checkConsumer with the current user.
2. Local User checks if it has a consumption.
3. Local User calls DeleteReport on the Data Manager.
4. Data Manager returns "Done".
5. Main returns "Success" to the Local User.
Expected Result: Report is deleted successfully.

Title: Delete Report with No Consumption
Preconditions: User does not have any consumption.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates checkConsumer with the current user.
2. Local User checks if it has a consumption.
3. Local User calls DeleteReport on the Data Manager.
4. Data Manager returns failure.
5. Main returns "Failure" to the Local User.
Expected Result: Report deletion fails due to no consumption.

Title: Display Report
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main requests report from the Data Manager.
6. Data Manager processes the report and returns success.
7. Data Manager sends success to the Web Server.
8. Web Server displays the report.
Expected Result: Report is displayed successfully on the Web Server.

Title: Display Report with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User does not have any report.
Test Steps:
1. Main initiates CheckAuthenticated with the current user.
2. CheckAuthenticated requests data from the Data Manager.
3. Data Manager returns success to CheckAuthenticated.
4. CheckAuthenticated passes success to Main.
5. Main requests report from the Data Manager.
6. Data Manager processes the report and returns failure.
7. Data Manager sends failure to the Web Server.
8. Web Server does not display the report.
Expected Result: Report display fails due to invalid data.
